projectDescription: Fictional streaming audio company. Five source systems (frontend events, backend app DB, third-party SaaS) feed three product domains — growth, marketing, finance — through a full staging/intermediate/mart pipeline with metrics and dashboards.

models.name: snowplow
models.description: Frontend behavioral event stream for web and mobile clients.

models.name: segment
models.description: Frontend CDP — marketing-instrumented events (signup, play, upgrade prompts).

models.name: app_postgres
models.description: Primary transactional database for fans, artists, and playlists. Ingested via change-data-capture.

models.name: stripe
models.description: Third-party billing provider for subscriptions, invoices, and dunning.

models.name: hubspot
models.description: Third-party CRM — contacts, lead-to-customer stages, campaign metadata.

models.name: raw_snowplow_events
models.description: Append-only landing table for Snowplow enriched events.

models.name: raw_segment_track
models.description: Landing table for Segment track-call payloads.

models.name: raw_app_users
models.description: CDC mirror of the users table from the application Postgres database.

models.name: raw_stripe_subscriptions
models.description: Landing table for Stripe subscription records.

models.name: raw_hubspot_contacts
models.description: Landing table for HubSpot contact records including lifecycle stage and campaign attribution.

models.name: stg_snowplow_events_clean
models.description: Typed columns, bot filtering, PII hashing.
models.sql:
-- stg_snowplow_events_clean
SELECT
  event_id,
  event_ts,
  SHA2(user_id, 256) AS user_id,
  artist_id,
  event_name,
  user_agent ILIKE '%bot%' AS is_bot
FROM {{ ref('raw_snowplow_events') }}
WHERE event_ts >= DATEADD(day, -30, CURRENT_DATE)

models.name: stg_segment_track_clean
models.description: Unnests Segment properties into typed columns used by marketing models.

columns.name: campaign_id
columns.description: UTM campaign id extracted from properties

models.sql:
-- stg_segment_track_clean
SELECT
  event_id,
  SHA2(user_id, 256) AS user_id,
  event,
  properties:utm_campaign::varchar AS campaign_id,
  COALESCE(properties:timestamp::timestamp_tz, received_at) AS event_ts
FROM {{ ref('raw_segment_track') }}

models.name: stg_app_users
models.description: Deduped, PII-hashed current snapshot of application users.

models.name: stg_stripe_subscriptions
models.description: Typed, latest-status view of Stripe subscriptions.

models.name: stg_hubspot_contacts
models.description: HubSpot contacts keyed by hashed email to join with the app-users staging table.

models.name: int_user_profile
models.description: Canonical cross-source user profile — links app users to their HubSpot contact via email hash. Reused across domains.
usageHints: Do not filter on country here — consumers should filter in their own mart.

models.name: int_user_day_listening
models.description: Rolls events into bounded listening sessions per user-day. Growth-domain-owned — gates all engagement metrics.

columns.name: user_sk
columns.description: Surrogate key for the fan dimension

columns.name: minutes_listened
columns.description: Total minutes listened on this date

columns.name: session_count
columns.description: Number of listening sessions on this date

models.sql:
-- int_user_day_listening
SELECT
  user_id::number AS user_sk,
  DATE(event_ts)  AS listening_date,
  SUM(duration_seconds) / 60.0 AS minutes_listened,
  COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) AS session_count
FROM {{ ref('stg_snowplow_events_clean') }}
WHERE event_name = 'play' AND NOT is_bot
GROUP BY 1, 2
caveats: Sessions split at 30 minutes of inactivity; mobile background audio may overcount.

models.name: int_marketing_touchpoints
models.description: Deduped user ↔ campaign touchpoints built from Segment events + HubSpot first-touch attribution.

models.name: int_subscription_events
models.description: Canonical event stream of subscription state transitions (created, upgraded, paused, churned).

columns.name: mrr_delta_usd
columns.description: Change in MRR contributed by this event

models.name: fct_fan_artist_week_affinity
models.description: Weekly affinity scores between fans and artists.

columns.name: week_start
columns.description: Monday date of the ISO week

columns.name: minutes_listened
columns.description: Total minutes the fan listened to this artist in the week

models.sql:
-- fct_fan_artist_week_affinity
SELECT
  {{ dbt_utils.generate_surrogate_key(['user_sk','artist_sk','week_start']) }} AS affinity_sk,
  user_sk AS fan_sk,
  artist_sk,
  DATE_TRUNC('week', listening_date) AS week_start,
  LOG(1 + SUM(minutes_listened)) / 10.0 AS affinity_score,
  SUM(minutes_listened) AS minutes_listened
FROM {{ ref('int_user_day_listening') }}
GROUP BY 2, 3, 4
usageHints: Prefer this grain for artist-level CRM campaigns.

models.name: dim_fan
models.description: Slowly changing dimension for fan/listener accounts.

columns.name: user_id
columns.description: Natural key — hashed fan account id

columns.name: is_current
columns.description: True if this is the current row

models.name: dim_artist
models.description: Slowly changing dimension for creator profiles.

columns.name: is_current
columns.description: True if this is the current row

models.name: dim_campaign
models.description: HubSpot + paid-ads campaigns keyed on campaign_id.

models.name: fct_marketing_attribution
models.description: Fan-level marketing attribution — connects first-touch campaign to subsequent conversion events and downstream revenue.

columns.name: converted_at
columns.description: Timestamp of paid conversion (null if not converted)

columns.name: attributed_mrr_usd
columns.description: MRR attributed to this first-touch campaign

models.name: fct_subscriber_health
models.description: Per-user subscription health fact for finance reporting.

columns.name: user_sk
columns.description: Surrogate primary key and FK to dim_fan

columns.name: dunning_stage
columns.description: Current dunning stage for failed payment recovery

columns.name: mrr
columns.description: Monthly recurring revenue for this subscriber

models.name: fct_weekly_revenue
models.description: Weekly revenue aggregated from subscription events — the source of the MRR headline metric.

columns.name: net_mrr_usd
columns.description: Net new MRR for the week

models.name: legacy_mart_listens_daily
models.description: Superseded by int_user_day_listening. Do not use.

models.name: growth_pulse_dashboard
models.description: Looker dashboard surfacing north-star growth KPIs for leadership reviews.

columns.name: top_artists_by_affinity
columns.description: Ranked list of top artists by fan affinity score

models.name: marketing_attribution_report
models.description: Mode notebook surfacing CAC and attribution-by-channel for the marketing team.

models.name: finance_mrr_snapshot
models.description: Weekly MRR snapshot emailed to the CFO every Monday.

edges.description: Snowplow loader lands events into raw.
Segment webhook lands track calls into raw.
Stripe batch API loads subscription records into raw.
HubSpot batch API loads contacts into raw.
App DB CDC mirrors users into raw.
Staging cleans raw Snowplow events.
Staging unnests Segment track payloads.
Staging dedupes app users.
Staging types Stripe subscriptions.
Staging typed HubSpot contacts.
Growth intermediate model built from clean events.
User profile joins app users…
…with HubSpot contacts on hashed email.
Marketing touchpoints built from Segment events.
HubSpot first-touch campaign feeds marketing touchpoints.
Subscription state events derived from Stripe staging.
Affinity fact built on user-day listening.
Fan dimension reads canonical user profile.
Marketing attribution fact built on touchpoints.
Marketing attribution joins in user profile.
Campaign dimension seeded from HubSpot metadata.
Subscriber health rolls up subscription events.
Subscriber health joins user profile.
Weekly revenue rolls up subscription events.
WAF metric computed from affinity fact.
Churn risk metric derived from subscriber health.
MRR metric derived from weekly revenue.
CAC metric derived from marketing attribution.
WAF powers the Growth Pulse dashboard.
CAC powers the marketing attribution report.
MRR metric powers the finance MRR snapshot.
Fact joins to fan dimension on fan_sk.
Fact joins to artist dimension on artist_sk.
Attribution fact joins to fan dimension.
Attribution fact joins to campaign dimension.
Subscriber health joins to fan dimension.

metrics.name: weekly_active_fans
metrics.description: Count of distinct fans with at least 1 minute listened in a rolling 7-day window.

metrics.name: total_mrr_usd
metrics.description: Monthly recurring revenue — sum of active subscriptions' MRR in USD.

metrics.name: churn_risk_score
metrics.description: Heuristic score 0–100 derived from listening drop-offs and billing dunning signals.
caveats: Draft model — do not use for finance reporting.

metrics.name: blended_cac_usd
metrics.description: Blended customer acquisition cost — marketing spend ÷ new paying fans.

dataMarts.name: growth_mart
dataMarts.description: Growth domain mart combining fan-artist affinity facts with fan and artist dimensions.

dataMarts.name: marketing_mart
dataMarts.description: Marketing attribution mart — fan × campaign with MRR attribution.

blueprints.name: fct_listen_sessions
blueprints.description: Planned session-grain fact table for fine-grained listening analytics.
blueprints.notes: Will replace legacy_mart_listens_daily once session boundaries are confirmed.

owners.name: dan.ortiz
owners.description: Platform data engineer — CDC & app-DB mirroring.

teams.name: data_platform
teams.description: Owns core pipelines and modeling standards.

teams.name: marketing_eng
teams.description: Owns Segment/HubSpot instrumentation and attribution models.

columnPatterns.description: Natural and source keys must end with _id
